FOnline ThirdParty pruning notes

This vendored copy is intentionally trimmed for the engine build. When updating
from upstream, remove these paths again after copying the new version.

Removed paths:
- gn/
- pkg-config/
- reference/
- samples/
- shaders/
- shaders-hlsl/
- shaders-hlsl-no-opt/
- shaders-msl/
- shaders-msl-no-opt/
- shaders-no-opt/
- shaders-other/
- shaders-reflection/
- shaders-ue4/
- shaders-ue4-no-opt/
- tests-other/
- .clang-format
- .github/
- .gitignore
- .reuse/
- appveyor.yml
- build_glslang_spirv_tools.sh
- checkout_glslang_spirv_tools.sh
- CODE_OF_CONDUCT.adoc
- format_all.sh
- main.cpp
- Makefile
- Package.swift
- spirv_cpp.cpp
- spirv_cpp.hpp
- spirv_cross.natvis
- spirv_cross_c.cpp
- spirv_cross_c.h
- spirv_cross_util.cpp
- spirv_cross_util.hpp
- spirv_reflect.cpp
- spirv_reflect.hpp
